Plasmid Replication Report

ColE1 / pBR322 plasmid replication with RNA I/II copy-number control (Ataai & Shuler 1986).

Duration: 2403s · Emission interval: 1s · Wall time: 944.3s (0.39× realtime) · Snapshots: 2401

Summary

full_plasmid count18
RNA I (inhibitor)3.0016.164
RNA II (primer)0.000.342
plasmid_active_replisomes0 0

RNA II initiation interval is ~360 s. Runs < 360 s generally don't show replication events; this report confirms the ODE plumbing but longer runs are needed for steady-state copy number (~20 at 60 min doubling).

Network visualization

Interactive Cytoscape viewer of the plasmid-enabled baseline composite (48 processes, 33 stores, 763 edges). Same viewer as the other reports — click any node to inspect port schemas, resolved store paths, docstring, and class. ecoli-plasmid-replication is in the DNA-replication subsystem (same color as chromosome replication).
